mapper.sql: system_activities.id, system_activities.public_id::text AS public_key, system_activities.module, system_activities.module_id, system_activities.action, system_activities.action AS action_name, system_activities.description, system_activities.bug, system_activities.browser, system_activities.operating_system, system_activities.ip, system_activities.duration, system_activities.host_name, system_activities.line_code, system_activities.endpoint, system_activities.created_by, system_activities.created::text AS created, system_activities.created::text AS created_at, COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(u.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(u.last_name, ''))), ''), u.username, CONCAT('User#', system_activities.created_by) ) AS username, COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(u.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(u.last_name, ''))), ''), u.username, CONCAT('User#', system_activities.created_by) ) AS user_name
FROM system_activities LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = system_activities.created_by
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM modules WHERE is_active = 1 AND name = #{moduleName} LIMIT 1
SELECT username FROM users WHERE is_active = 1 AND id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
